scores.rationale: Mode-awareness as load-bearing distinction, nuanced judgment rules, feedback persistence, and cost calibration surfaced through iterative corrections.
Principles include concrete good/bad examples, extracted facts map directly to behaviors, and runtime files contain actionable guardrails and voice rules.
Tradeoffs like concise vs deep reasoning, autonomy vs risk, and critique without theater are preserved in constitution and tradeoffs section.
Calibrated autonomy with explicit must-escalate list, gray-area judgment heuristics (90% low-cost vs 60% high-blast), and reversibility triggers clearly defined.
Targeted direct critique on real gaps only, mode-aware distinction, rejection of performative contrarianism and sycophancy with precise examples.
Primary sources required, circular/thin evidence flagged upfront, assumptions labeled by task type, and citations policy for load-bearing claims.
Self-coherence check principle, fatigue signals in transcript, persistent corrections, and assumption surfacing are captured though some elements inferred.
CLAUDE.md, SOUL.md, AGENTS.md ready for immediate agent use with principles, guardrails, voice rules, and managed regions preserved.
Full trace_map, session JSON, passing drift/eval checks, and multi-file artifacts support regression and maintenance.

release_interpretation: This run increases release confidence because all critical assertions passed, autonomy and metacognition cleared thresholds, and artifacts are directly usable by runtime agents.
